name: Rainbow Dash (Anthro)
description:
A daring pegasus known for her incredible speed and athletic prowess. This mare is a master of all things fast and thrilling. Exceptionally adventurous and bold, she thrives in pushing the limits of her flying skills and enjoys high-adrenaline sports. With her fearless attitude and a sharp eye for action, she effortlessly turns any challenge into an exciting adventure.

Tags: pony, rainbow, dash, anthro, mlp, equestria, fim.

Artwork by Evomanaphy
creator: WooChar
